subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-20
subcodes.first_line: If a person is confirmed in the accomplishment of the services of the Kingdom... Indeed the most enduring and imperishable work was performed by the disciples
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @Mary Magdalene, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
